title: WOS Semantic Profile Document
description: A WOS Semantic Profile Document per the WOS Semantic Profile specification v1.0. A parallel seam document that declares linked data semantics for a WOS workflow: a JSON-LD @context mapping WOS properties to RDF terms, SHACL shape references for semantic validation, PROV-O vocabulary mappings for provenance export, and XES/OCEL export configuration for process mining interoperability. The Semantic Profile adds interpretation and export capability without changing how WOS documents are processed. WOS MUST NOT alter core Formspec processing semantics.

^x-.$comment: Vendor extensions per Kernel spec §10.6 (extensions escape hatch)

$wosSemanticProfile.description: WOS Semantic Profile specification version. MUST be '1.0'. Identifies this document as a WOS Semantic Profile Document and pins the specification version.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker and version pin for WOS Semantic Profile documents

targetWorkflow.description: The WOS Kernel Document this profile targets. Specifies URL and compatible version range.

x-lm.intent: Binds this semantic profile to a specific kernel workflow and version range

version.description: Version of this Semantic Profile Document. SemVer is RECOMMENDED.

title.description: Human-readable name for this semantic profile.

description.description: Human-readable description of the semantic profile's purpose and scope.

context.description: JSON-LD @context configuration. Declares the context document URL, version, additional namespaces, and domain vocabulary extensions.

x-lm.intent: JSON-LD context configuration that maps WOS properties to RDF terms

shapes.description: SHACL shape configuration. Declares shape graph URIs for semantic validation of WOS documents interpreted as RDF.

provMapping.description: PROV-O vocabulary mapping configuration. Declares how WOS provenance records map to W3C PROV-O graphs.

processMining.description: XES/OCEL export configuration. Declares how WOS provenance records map to process mining event formats.

url.description: Canonical URL of the target WOS Kernel Document.

x-lm.intent: Identifies the kernel workflow this profile provides linked data semantics for

compatibleVersions.description: SemVer range expression for compatible kernel document versions.

contextUrl.description: URL of the JSON-LD @context document to apply to WOS documents. The normative WOS context is published at https://wos-spec.org/context/{version}.

x-lm.intent: URL of the JSON-LD context document that maps WOS properties to RDF IRIs

contextVersion.description: Version of the context document. Synchronized with the WOS specification version. A semantic processor MUST reject a context document whose major version it does not support.

x-lm.intent: Context document version for compatibility checking

namespaces.description: Additional namespace prefix-to-IRI mappings beyond the base WOS context. Keys are namespace prefixes, values are namespace IRIs.

domainVocabularies.description: External domain vocabularies to incorporate into the @context. Each vocabulary declares a namespace prefix and IRI for domain-specific case data interoperability.

prefix.description: Namespace prefix for this vocabulary. Used in the expanded @context.

description.description: Human-readable description of this vocabulary's purpose and scope.

shapeGraphs.description: URIs of SHACL shape graphs to apply when validating WOS documents as RDF. The standard WOS shapes (SP-01 through SP-08) are published at https://wos-spec.org/shapes/1.0.0.

x-lm.intent: SHACL shape graph URIs for semantic validation of WOS documents

severity.description: Minimum severity for reported SHACL violations. 'violation': only sh:Violation results. 'warning': sh:Violation and sh:Warning. 'info': all results.

scope.description: What to validate with SHACL shapes. 'definition': the workflow definition only. 'provenance': provenance records only. 'all': both definition and provenance.

provenanceNamespace.description: Base namespace for minting provenance IRIs in the PROV-O output graph. Record identifiers are appended to this namespace to form Activity IRIs.

x-lm.intent: Base IRI namespace for PROV-O provenance graph output

actorMapping.description: Customized mapping of WOS actor types to PROV-O Agent subclass IRIs. Keys are WOS actor types ('human', 'system', 'agent'), values are RDF type IRIs. Defaults: human -> prov:Person, system -> prov:SoftwareAgent, agent -> wos:AIAgent.

reasoning.description: RDF type IRI for Reasoning tier prov:Bundle instances.

counterfactual.description: RDF type IRI for Counterfactual tier prov:Bundle instances.

narrative.description: RDF type IRI for Narrative tier prov:Bundle instances. Narrative bundles MUST include wos:authoritative false.

tierMapping.description: Customized mapping of WOS provenance tiers to PROV-O Bundle type IRIs.

formats.description: Process mining export formats to support. 'xes': IEEE XES (Std 1849-2016) for legacy process mining tools. 'ocel': OCEL 2.0 object-centric event logs for modern process mining. Both may be specified.

x-lm.intent: Process mining export format selection (XES and/or OCEL 2.0)

caseIdentifier.description: The case state field used as the XES case identifier (trace concept:name). Default: 'instanceId'.

eventClassifier.description: The provenance field used as the XES activity classifier (event concept:name). Default: 'action'.

objectTypes.description: For OCEL export: WOS object types (case file item types) to include in the object-centric event log. When omitted, all case file item types are included.

ExtensionsMap.description: Vendor extension data attached to this node. All keys MUST start with 'x-' (see Kernel §10.6). The reserved namespace 'x-wos-*' is for WOS Working Group use only; third-party extensions MUST use a unique vendor prefix (e.g., 'x-acme-', 'x-vendor-'). Processors MUST ignore unknown extension keys to preserve forward compatibility. Extension values are unconstrained — any JSON value is valid, but authors are encouraged to document the shape in their vendor spec.

JsonSchemaUri.description: Optional JSON Schema URI enabling editor validation and autocompletion. When present, editors (VS Code, IntelliJ, etc.) validate the document against this schema. Omit in production documents; the authoritative schema URI is derived from the document type marker (e.g., '$wosKernel': '1.0'). Used for author-time tooling only — runtime processors MUST ignore this field.
